transcript:
Alice: Q3 planning. We have four initiatives to slot in.
Bob: Mobile app rewrite is my top priority — current code is unmaintainable.
Carol: SOC2 audit prep is non-negotiable. Deadline is September 15th.
Dave: Self-serve onboarding flow — sales has been blocked on this for months.
Eve: Internal admin tools rewrite. Lower urgency but a constant tax.
Alice: We can't do all four. Let's rank.
Carol: SOC2 first. Hard deadline.
Bob: Then mobile rewrite — it's blocking three product launches.
Dave: Self-serve next. I'll own this.
Alice: Eve, internal admin slides to Q4.
Eve: Fair enough.
Alice: Decision: Q3 priorities are SOC2, mobile rewrite, self-serve, in that order. Admin tools deferred to Q4.
Carol: I'll have a SOC2 work breakdown by Monday.
Bob: I'll start the mobile rewrite RFC this week.
Dave: I'll draft a self-serve PRD by next Friday.
Alice: Reconvene in two weeks to check progress.
